rules.name: compute-quantity-rejected
rules.description: QtyRejected is auto-computed as QtyInspected minus QtyAccepted. Not directly editable.

rules.name: validate-accepted-not-exceeds-inspected
rules.description: QtyAccepted must not exceed QtyInspected. Prevents data entry errors.
rules.errorMessage: Accepted quantity cannot exceed inspected quantity.

rules.name: default-inspection-date-today
rules.description: InspectionDate defaults to today when creating a new record.

rules.name: result-fail-requires-notes
rules.description: When Result is Fail or Conditional, Notes field becomes required to document the reason.
rules.errorMessage: Notes are required when result is Fail or Conditional.
